name: rtk-hook
description: Codex plugin that migrates RTK Codex guidance into a PreToolUse hook.

interface.shortDescription: Enforces RTK command prefixing through a Codex hook.
interface.longDescription: Migrates the original RTK Codex AGENTS.md/RTK.md guidance into a plugin-bundled PreToolUse hook. The plugin does not patch RTK itself.
defaultPrompt: Use the RTK Codex hook for shell commands.
